title: pelargonium × lanosum
intro: Pelargonium × lanosum, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its clusters of small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as sore throats, coughs, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Pelargonium × lanosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
